contentPattern.structure: bold sub-heading + descriptive paragraph, arranged in a responsive two-column grid

suitableFor: text-only two-column heading + paragraph grids (e.g. 'Initiative Key Considerations', 'Results and Deliverables')
case-study consideration / outcome grids without images or icons
feature-point grids where each cell is a short bold title plus a paragraph
notSuitableFor: grids with icons (use cards-service-nav or cards-services)
grids with large photos (use cards-departments or cards-products)
